sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_logic (id INT, condition_a BOOLEAN, condition_b BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_logic (id, condition_a, condition_b) VALUES (1, true, true);
INSERT INTO test_logic (id, condition_a, condition_b) VALUES (2, true, false);
SELECT id, "and"(condition_a, condition_b) AS result FROM test_logic;
UPDATE test_logic SET condition_a = false WHERE id = 1;
